added.title: Double Oh Beth
added.description: With most of the class already gone for spring break, a nefarious villain infiltrates the school. Luckily a sleeper agent has been lying in wait. Hold on... it's BETH?!? Oh boy.

added.title: Do or Diaper
added.description: Mordecai has to kiss Margaret by the end of the week or else wear a diaper.

added.title: Quips
added.description: Skips has to tell his cousin Tips to stop telling bad jokes.

added.title: Caveman
added.description: Mordecai and Rigby want to civilize a caveman so that Benson will let him stay at the park.

added.title: That's My Television
added.description: Mordecai and Rigby want to help their favorite 80's sitcom star escape to the mountains.

added.title: A Bunch of Full Grown Geese
added.description: Mordecai and Rigby have to get rid of some geese that are causing problems at the park.

added.title: Grizz's Doc
added.description: Unica and the bears enter into Glitterwood's annual bake off while Grizz documents it.

added.title: Secret Origin of the Batwheels
added.description: When Batman, Robin, and Batgirl are all captured, the Batcomputer brings the Bat-Vehicles to life. Now the newly-minted Batwheels must defend the Batcave and face off with the Legion of Zoom… all without Batman's help!

added.title: On the Trail of the Cloud Bouncer
added.description: When spores from a strange plant take over control of the Cloudseeker, Cheer and the team must risk losing the vehicle - their home away from home and their only way back to Care-A-Lot - in order to save the Whiffles' newly-planted valley.

added.title: The Ulti-Bat Rises
added.description: When the Legion of Zoom gains control of the Batcave's giant T-Rex, MOE creates a giant Bat-robot to stop the marauding dinosaur.

added.title: Tough Buff Blues
added.description: After he takes down Riddler with an impressive wheel slam move, the Batwheels give Buff the nickname "Tough Buff." But Buff abruptly bristles at the name, leading the Batwheels to realize that it's not okay to call your friends nicknames that they don't like.

added.title: Where Oh Where Has Our Funshine Gone?
added.description: When Funshine uses the Care Bears' work time to develop his latest comic book character, his creative playtime jeopardizes the success of the team's mission to a strange part of the Silver Lining.

removed.title: Thomas' Promise
removed.description: When Thomas and Diesel both want to deliver the same load to Whiff's Recycling Plant, Thomas suggests they each take half of the load, but Diesel turns it into a race.
removed.originalseriesname: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go

removed.title: Get in Gear/Free-Wheelin' Ferris Wheel
removed.description: Panic erupts in Pretty Big City when the big clock breaks and no one is able to tell what time it is./Zee is showing off his inventions at his rocket-powered show, including his latest creation, a rocket powered Ferris wheel.

removed.title: Polly's New Crew
removed.description: The bears reunite with their old friend Polly the Pirate Captain. They soon learn that Polly is under the effect of a pirate curse and need to help them overcome it.

removed.title: The Legend of Jack O'Lantern/The Mecha T-Rex
removed.description: It's Halloween and everything is set for the Zee Mobile to pull the haunted hayride… until it drives away./Timmy can't wait to trick or treat as a Mecha T-Rex, but his Halloween is almost ruined when he can't reach the arms to his costume.

removed.title: Can't Stop the Martians/Best Nest Test
removed.description: The Martians come to Pretty Big City but find themselves in need of help when they are unable to land their spaceship./Zee needs to communicate with Sif in outer space but can't because a bird has made its home on top of the satellite dish!

removed.title: Special Delivery/Super Duper Sled Slide
removed.description: The Martians want to help LLoyd deliver packages, but keep breaking them when they drop them from up high./MacBarm and Zee built a slide that sends people all the way across the farm… which means people spend more time walking than sliding.

removed.title: Rules of the Game
removed.description: When Thomas builds an obstacle course for his friends, he gets upset when they won't play with it HIS way.
removed.originalseriesname: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go

removed.title: The Escaping Cows of Sunny Field Farm/Measure For Measure
removed.description: Zee's new drone accidentally doubles as a cow caller, and the cows keep leaving the farm to go see it. But how?/Marwyn attempts to make Pretty Big City's largest cookie, but to do so, he'll need a lot of help.

removed.title: License to Deliver
removed.description: When Percy has to deliver a new light bulb to the lighthouse at night, Thomas suggests playing secret agents along the way to help Percy forget about his fear of the dark.
removed.originalseriesname: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go

removed.title: Thomas Blasts Off
removed.description: It's rocket launch day and all the trains get to help deliver the big rocket parts, but when Thomas is assigned a tiny part, he puts it off to help the others with their more exciting parts, not realizing that his "small" task was just as important.
removed.originalseriesname: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go

removed.title: That's the Way the Windmill Blows!/Mecha Machine Makers!
removed.description: The windmill isn't turning, which means Sunny Field Farm has no power. The windmill needs to turn again so Zee can launch his rocket!/Izzy and Timmy are making a bird caller for Grandma, but have trouble connecting pieces of their machine.

removed.title: All Mechas on Deck/Where There's A Wheel, There's A Way
removed.description: Lloyd's testing a wind-up powered go-cart, but a problem arises when it keeps running out of energy./Sif's coming in for a landing at the rocket launch site - until her rocket is pushed off course by a satellite!

removed.title: The Whatsacallit of Treetop Woods/Nat in the Dark!
removed.description: Berta is opening an exhibit on the Whatsacallit of Treetop Woods. If only she could get a picture to prove it's real./Gerry and Nat are leading the Treetop Troops on a hike, but Nat finds himself lost in the woods as it gets darker.

removed.title: The Need for Feed/The Zipline Sisters of Treetop Woods
removed.description: MacBarm is bringing food to his hungry chickens, that is, until all of the food falls out of his truck./Grandma and her twin sister want to recreate their old zipline act, but quickly discover that the zipline no longer exists!

removed.title: MacBarm's Day Off/Playhouse Problems
removed.description: It's MacBarm's day off and Zee takes over harvesting carrots with his Zee mobile, but when it breaks, the work still needs to be done./Ranger Nat is bringing a playhouse on the train for Timmy and Izzy, but it won't fit through the tunnel!

removed.title: Moo-ving Day!/Follow That Breeze
removed.description: Zee's growth ray turns Moobert giant, but when a storm rolls in, the Mechas need to build a shelter big enough to fit her./After Ranger Nat's kite blows away in the wind, the Mechas and Timmy learn to build their own kite to find it.

removed.title: Silly Hat Catastrophe!/Zee In A Bottle
removed.description: Lloyd is selling silly hats at the factory, but when the hat machine malfunctions it starts raining silly hats on Pretty Big City!/Zee makes a giant rocket ship in a bottle, but things take a turn when he gets stuck inside!

removed.title: Let's Get Rolling!/A Bit of a Stretch!
removed.description: It's MacBarm's croquet tournament and Zee made giant decorations but they're too big to get to the farm./It's the opening day of the skyscraper and the Mechas need to put the sphere on top of the building before the ribbon cutting ceremony.

removed.title: Starter Pack
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby want to stop Muscle Man from messing with Thomas.

removed.title: Pie Contest
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby want to prove to Benson that they can be judges at the pie contest.

removed.title: Payback/Party Bus
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby are driving to a Halloween party and tell scary stories to pass the time.

removed.title: Wallpaper Man
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby are driving to a Halloween party and tell scary stories to pass the time.

removed.title: Exit 9B
removed.description: Mordecai and Rigby are the only ones who can save the park after everyone gets brain washed.
